footer.brandDescription: An all-in-one platform to manage job applications, create professional CVs, and build a digital portfolio.

donationModal.title: Support KarirKit Operations
donationModal.description: KarirKit runs without ads to support job seekers in Indonesia, and your donation helps us cover server costs, system maintenance, and feature development so the service can keep running and improving.

error.unexpected: Sorry, something unexpected happened. Our team has been notified.

subscription.cvLimitReached: You’ve reached your CV limit. Upgrade your plan on the Subscription page to increase your quota.

subscription.appLetterLimitReached: You’ve reached your cover letter limit. Upgrade your plan on the Subscription page to increase your quota.
subscription.premiumTemplateRequired: Premium templates are only available for Pro or Max users. Upgrade your plan on the Subscription page to continue.
subscription.documentAccessDenied: Document features are only available for Pro or Max users. Upgrade your plan to unlock access.
